Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Carturus]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 7''' — Carturus is a frozen ocean planet with a layer of thick ice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Doctor Nova was taken to Carturus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Carturus is a frozen world where the Advocates keep their prisoners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — Carturus is a system that The Last Horizon is traveling toward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — Carturus is a location that the characters are not yet close to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — The crew is attempting to determine if they are in teleporter range of Carturus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — Carturus is a destination for the team's flight path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 14''' — The lightning rabbit is not native to Carturus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — A battle occurred on Carturus involving Starhammer.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
